mapper.select: SELECT id, title, status, category_id, created_at, updated_at FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (title, content, status, category_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{categoryId})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.created_at FROM tags t INNER JOIN article_tags at ON t.id = at.tag_id WHERE at.article_id = #{articleId}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.category_id, a.created_at, a.updated_at, c.name as category_name, c.id as cat_id FROM articles a LEFT JOIN categories c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.category_id, a.created_at, a.updated_at, c.name as category_name, c.id as cat_id FROM articles a INNER JOIN categories c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND LOWER(c.name) = LOWER(#{categorySlug}) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles a INNER JOIN categories c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND LOWER(c.name) = LOWER(#{categorySlug})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_tags WHERE tag_id = #{tagId}

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.category_id, a.created_at, a.updated_at, c.name as category_name, c.id as cat_id FROM articles a INNER JOIN article_tags at ON a.id = at.article_id INNER JOIN tags t ON at.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND LOWER(t.name) = LOWER(#{tagSlug}) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM articles a INNER JOIN article_tags at ON a.id = at.article_id INNER JOIN tags t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND LOWER(t.name) = LOWER(#{tagSlug})

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.category_id, a.created_at, a.updated_at, c.name as category_name, c.id as cat_id FROM articles a LEFT JOIN categories c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND ( LOWER(a.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(a.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )
AND 1=0
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles a WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND ( LOWER(a.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(a.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )
AND 1=0
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET content = #{content}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
